short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal distracts US
rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; Iran deal negotiations keep US attention divided, which is a persistent concern for Ukrainian war support.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — ongoing active combat
top_events.summary: War continues with no ceasefire or qualitative shift; daily strikes and frontline fighting remain the dominant reality for Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: US diplomatic focus on Iran deal continues to divert attention and political capital away from Ukraine, a persistent risk to Western military and financial aid.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon as Middle East tensions rise
top_events.summary: Escalating Middle East conflict further competes for Western attention and resources, potentially reducing focus on Ukrainian support.
